best_practices: Open with a clear promise in the first 10 seconds.
Use one primary keyword naturally in the title and first description paragraph.
Keep thumbnail text short, bold, and easy to read on mobile.
End each video with one simple next action for the viewer.
Link related videos and playlists to extend session time.
Review the format and topic of 'Why Nations Fight Over Profit #geopolitics #historical' because it is outperforming the recent channel average.

Consider refreshing the packaging of the latest upload 'எடெஸ்ஸா வீழ்ச்சியும் இரண்டாம் சிலுவைப் போர் தோல்வியும் #எடெஸ்ஸா #இரண்டாம்சிலுவைப்போர் #Noolisam' with stronger titles, descriptions, and thumbnails.
Increase audience interaction prompts by asking one clear question in each video and description to encourage more comments.
Add clearer calls to action for likes and highlight the main value earlier to improve engagement rate.
